USysRibbons.RibbonXml:
<customUI xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/office/2009/07/customui" onLoad="OnRibbonLoad"> <ribbon startFromScratch="false"> <tabs> <tab id="tabDevPulse" insertBeforeMso="TabHomeAccess" label="DEVPULSE">
<group id="grpNavigate" label="NAVIGATE"> <button id="btnHome" size="large" label="HOME" screentip="Return to the DevPulse main screen" imageMso="CreateForm" onAction="=Ribbon_NodeClicks(1)" /> <button id="btnProjects" size="large" label="PROJECTS" screentip="Projects and Steps" imageMso="NewTask" onAction="=Ribbon_NodeClicks(2)" /> <button id="btnSessions" size="large" label="SESSIONS" screentip="Sessions" imageMso="AddPeoplesCalendar" onAction="=Ribbon_NodeClicks(3)" /> <button id="btnRptSummary" size="large" label="PROJECT SUMMARY" screentip="Project Summary Report" imageMso="CreateReport" onAction="=Ribbon_NodeClicks(4)" /> </group>
<group id="grpMaintenance" label="MAINTENANCE"> <button id="btnProjectArea" size="normal" label="Project Areas" imageMso="ListView" onAction="=Ribbon_NodeClicks(10)" /> <button id="btnStatus" size="normal" label="Statuses" imageMso="PictureAutoBalance" onAction="=Ribbon_NodeClicks(11)" /> <button id="btnStepType" size="normal" label="Step Types" imageMso="ViewPageBreakPreviewView" onAction="=Ribbon_NodeClicks(12)" /> <button id="btnTool" size="normal" label="Tools" imageMso="NavigationView" onAction="=Ribbon_NodeClicks(13)" /> <button id="btnOutputType" size="normal" label="Output Types" imageMso="FileServerTransferDatabase" onAction="=Ribbon_NodeClicks(14)" /> <button id="btnAppConfig" size="normal" label="App Config" imageMso="QuickPublish" onAction="=Ribbon_NodeClicks(15)" /> </group>
<group id="grpAdmin" label="ADMIN"> <button idMso="FileCompactAndRepairDatabase" size="large" showLabel="false" /> <button id="btnBackup" size="large" label="BACKUP" screentip="Backup the front-end database" imageMso="FileBackUpSqlDatabase" onAction="=Ribbon_NodeClicks(21)" /> <button id="btnClearData" size="large" label="CLEAR DATA" screentip="Clear example data and configure for first use" imageMso="DeleteRows" getEnabled="Ribbon_GetEnabled" onAction="=Ribbon_NodeClicks(22)" /> </group>
<group id="grpQuit" label="QUIT"> <button id="btnQuit" size="large" label="QUIT DevPulse" imageMso="StopLtrDown" onAction="=Ribbon_NodeClicks(99)" /> </group>
</tab> </tabs> </ribbon> </customUI>
